name: BACARDÍ Coquito
description: A festive Puerto Rican coconut-and-spice rum punch made with Bacardí Carta Blanca. It’s not a holiday in Puerto Rico without Coquito, and it’s not an original Coquito without BACARDÍ.
recipe_steps: Pour all ingredients into a large punch bowl and mix.
Serve in individual cordial glasses or mugs.
Garnish with a sprinkle of cinnamon or a cinnamon stick.
searchable_text: BACARDÍ Coquito main rum BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum A festive Puerto Rican coconut-and-spice rum punch made with Bacardí Carta Blanca. It’s not a holiday in Puerto Rico without Coquito, and it’s not an original Coquito without BACARDÍ. ingredients 480 ML BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, 355 ML evaporated milk, 355 ML coconut cream, 355 ML sweetened condensed milk, vanilla spices recipe steps Pour all ingredients into a large punch bowl and mix. Refrigerate before serving. Serve in individual cordial glasses or mugs. Garnish with a sprinkle of cinnamon or a cinnamon stick.
